rate

(/rk4tau/reactions/reaction/rate)

Here, you give the rate of the reaction. The units of the rate depend on the 'arity' of the reaction; how many substrates it has and what their multiplicities are. In nature, the important reactions are either unary or binary. The rate of a unary reaction is in Hz, while the rate of a binary reaction is in (Hz)(l)/(mol)

AttributesChildren
  • value
